steps.title: Compute the value
steps.content: The speed changes by $57$ meters per second over $6$ seconds: $$a=\frac{57}{6}=9.5.$$

steps.title: Check the units
steps.content: The formula divides change in speed by time, so the result is in meters per second squared. No extra conversion is needed.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The average acceleration is $9.5$ meters per second squared, which matches the correct answer, B.
